DEFENDANT IN COURT WITH COUNSEL BRITT NEWMAN. PROSECUTING ATTORNEY(S) JASMINE JACKSON PRESENT. COURT REPORTER LORI KLODNIK PRESENT. DEFENDANT FULLY ADVISED IN OPEN COURT OF HIS-HER CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS AND PENALTIES. ON RECOMMENDATION OF PROSECUTOR COUNT(S) 2 IS-ARE AMENDED TO NEGLIGENT ASSAULT R.C. 2903.14 A M3 WITH FORFEITURE SPECIFICATION(S) (2941.1417). ON RECOMMENDATION OF PROSECUTOR, COUNT(S) 2 OF INDICTMENT IS-ARE AMENDED BY DELETION OF FIREARM SPECIFICATION - 1 YEAR (2941.141), FIREARM SPECIFICATION - 3 YEARS (2941.145). DEFENDANT RETRACTS FORMER PLEA OF NOT GUILTY AND ENTERS A PLEA OF GUILTY TO NEGLIGENT ASSAULT R.C. 2903.14 A M3 WITH FORFEITURE SPECIFICATION(S) (2941.1417) AS CHARGED IN COUNT(S) 2 OF THE INDICTMENT. DEFENDANT RETRACTS FORMER PLEA OF NOT GUILTY AND ENTERS A PLEA OF GUILTY TO OBSTRUCTING OFFICIAL BUSINESS R.C. 2921.31 A F5 AS CHARGED IN COUNT(S) 3 OF THE INDICTMENT. DEFENDANT RETRACTS FORMER PLEA OF NOT GUILTY AND ENTERS A PLEA OF GUILTY TO USING WEAPONS WHILE INTOXICATED R.C. 2923.15 A M1 WITH FORFEITURE SPECIFICATION(S) (2941.1417) AS CHARGED IN COUNT(S) 4 OF THE INDICTMENT. COUNT(S) 1 IS-ARE DISMISSED. COURT ACCEPTS DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA. DEFENDANT TO FORFEIT TO ARRESTING AGENCY: WEAPON DEFENDANT ADDRESSES THE COURT, PROSECUTOR JASMINE JACKSON ADDRESSES THE COURT. THE COURT CONSIDERED ALL REQUIRED FACTORS OF THE LAW. THE COURT FINDS THAT A COMMUNITY CONTROL - PROBATION SANCTION WILL ADEQUATELY PROTECT THE PUBLIC AND WILL NOT DEMEAN THE SERIOUSNESS OF THE OFFENSE. IT IS THEREFORE ORDERED THAT THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 2 YEAR(S) OF COMMUNITY CONTROL - PROBATION ON EACH COUNT, UNDER SUPERVISION OF THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT. THE DEFENDANT MUST ABIDE BY THE RULES AND REGULATIONS OF THE PROBATION DEPARTMENT IN ADDITION TO THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: MAY TERMINATE IN ONE YEAR IF IN COMPLIANCE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO BE SUPERVISED BY: REGULAR SUPERVISION UNIT DEFENDANT TO PERFORM COURT COMMUNITY WORK SERVICE FOR 160 HOURS. COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT TO RANDOM DRUG TESTING THE DEFENDANT IS REFERRED TO TASC FOR A SUBSTANCE ABUSE ASSESSMENT. ATTEND AA-NA-CA OR SELF HELP MEETINGS, 2 PER WEEK, PROVIDE PROOF OF MEETINGS TO THE SUPERVISING OFFICER. WEEKLY MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES GPS MONITOR TO BE REMOVED. SUPERVISION FEES TO BE PAID AT A RATE OF $20.00 A MONTH. THE COURT HEREBY ENTERS JUDGMENT AGAINST THE DEFENDANT IN AN AMOUNT EQUAL TO THE COSTS OF THIS PROSECUTION. ALL MOTIONS NOT SPECIFICALLY RULED ON PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THIS JUDGMENT ENTRY ARE DENIED AS MOOT. 01-24-2024 CPMRC 01-24-2024 10:55:38
